subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Thy mention hath been made before Him Who is the Most Mentioned One. God willing, thou shalt, at all times, drink from the most pure nectar from the chalice [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله ذکرت بین یدی مذکور انشاء الله از رحیق اطهر در کل حین از کاوس
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @love of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the concourse on high
